# README

See [the spec](docs/specs/file-browser.md) for the full contract,
or jump straight to the [resolver section](docs/specs/file-browser.md:519).

The implementation lives in:
- [file-browser.js](src/public/file-browser.js)
- [file-find.js](src/public/file-find.js:42)

Bug history is in [docs/history](docs/history/README.md).
